author: y4rr
content: Plan: Distribution-moment tests for stochastic transforms (#872). Per sprint spec: RandomFlip p=0.5 → sample N=10000, verify ~50% flip rate (allow 2% margin: 48-52%). RandomCrop: bounding-box stats match torchvision crop-region expectations. cascade_skip exact-output fixtures with reason 'RNG algorithm divergence; distribution moments verified via repeated sampling'. All existing exact-output tests for p=0/1 stay (deterministic). New moment tests added to conformance_vision_transforms.rs.
